warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: The statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties arising from civil summonses for violations of the Transit Rules of Conduct.

evidence_refs.source_quote: TAB is the statutory administrative tribunal that receives, processes, adjudicates and pursues collection of civil penalties arising from the tens of thousands of civil summonses that are issued each year for violations of the Transit Rules of Conduct.
The purpose of this quarterly report is to update the Transit Committee on Transit Adjudication Bureau (TAB) activities and outcomes

Summonses issued in the first quarter increased by 80% (from 30,382 in 2022 to 54,692 in 2023).

tool_args.label: State Tax Refund Payments Count 1st Qtr 2023
State Tax Refund Payments Count 1st Qtr 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: TAB revenue exceeded expenses by $2,265,496 compared to $1,095,956 for the first quarter of 2022.
TAB received 33,402 payments in 2023, a 79.3% increase from the 18,633 received in 2022.
Direct payments increased by 94.3% (14,944 to 29,041) from the first quarter of 2022

payload.raw_value_text: payments received from state tax refunds increased 18.2% from 3,689 to 4,361

evidence_refs.source_quote: payments received from state tax refunds increased 18.2% from 3,689 to 4,361.

payload.raw_value_text: Overall total revenue for the first quarter totaled $3,353,234, a 66.8% increase from the 2022 first quarter revenue of $2,010,571

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overall total revenue for the first quarter totaled $3,353,234, a 66.8% increase from the 2022 first quarter revenue of $2,010,571.

payload.raw_value_text: Receipts from direct payments increased by 89.1% to $2,702,146 in 2023 as compared to $1,428,983

evidence_refs.source_quote: Receipts from direct payments increased by 89.1% to $2,702,146 in 2023 as compared to $1,428,983 in the first quarter of 2022.

payload.raw_value_text: The $692,465 in first quarter receipts from state tax refunds... represented a 16.4% increase from first quarter state tax refunds of $594,965

evidence_refs.source_quote: The $692,465 in first quarter receipts from state tax refunds relating to outstanding judgments from prior years, represented a 16.4% increase from first quarter state tax refunds of $594,965 in 2022.
Expenses increased by 18.9% ($1,087,738 compared to $914,606) from the first quarter of 2022.
